zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Mainwaring於1401年出生在英國英格蘭爾奧維時，她的父親Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet38歲，母親Lady Margery Venables , Baroness32歲。她於1419年與Thomas de Fouleshurst II在英國英格蘭爾切斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1483年3月6日在英國英格蘭爾南特維其享年82歲。

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Mainwaring was born in 1401, in Over, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet, was 38 and her mother, Lady Margery Venables , Baroness, was 32. She married Thomas de Fouleshurst II in 1419, in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 6 March 1483, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 mars 1483, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

KT ,Knight,  Baronet 38 und ihre Mutter Lady Margery Venables , Baroness 32. Sie hat 1419 in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas de Fouleshurst II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. März 1483 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Mainwaringが1401年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバーで生まれた時，父Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronetは38歳，母Lady Margery Venables , Baronessは32歳であった。1419年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターでThomas de Fouleshurst IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1483年3月6日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Mainwaring(이)가 1401년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margery Venables , Baroness(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1419년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에서 Thomas de Fouleshurst II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1483년 3월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 난트위치에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

KT ,Knight,  Baronet, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margery Venables , Baroness, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Fouleshurst II em 1419, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Mainwaring родилась в 1401 г. в местности овир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margery Venables , Baroness, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Fouleshurst II в 1419 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 6 марта 1483 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.

Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 6 de marzo de 1483, en Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años.
